title: Stone of All Time
description:
A massive boulder sits in the middle of an abandoned courtyard.

A plaque reads:
[gold][b]Stone of All Time[/b][/gold].

Its presence, shape, and adornments indicate that this courtyard was built around this [blue]Stone[/blue] and that it has never moved from this spot.

options.title: Drink and Lift
options.description: Lose [red][a random potion from your inventory][/red]. Gain [blue]10[/blue] Max HP.

options.title: Push
options.requires: Requires at least one Attack card in deck

conditions: All players must have at least one potion
notes: When choosing "Drink and Lift", you randomly consume one of your potions and gain 10 Max HP. When choosing "Push", you take 6 unblockable, unpowered damage, then select one Attack card from your deck to enchant with [purple]Vigorous[/purple] at power level 8. Both options have lock conditions: Drink and Lift requires at least one potion in your inventory, and Push requires at least one Attack card in your deck that can be enchanted with Vigorous.
